front: How does the Merrifield resin differ from Wang resin in peptide synthesis?
back: Merrifield resin: chloromethyl polystyrene, peptide attached via ester bond, cleaved with HF/anisole. Wang resin: p-benzyloxybenzyl alcohol linker, cleaved with TFA. Wang resin is more acid-labile and compatible with Fmoc chemistry.
